scope: Bounded artifact shape for external DPI/proxy reachability evidence. This contract describes what a future lab or field artifact must contain before local anti-censorship or obfuscation evidence can be upgraded to an external DPI/proxy reachability claim.

related_current_artifacts.claim_boundary: Required external evidence is absent; proof gate must reject this claim.
Local loopback packet capture only; not remote-path, DPI, whitelist, or production evidence.

validator.current_expected_decision: REJECTED until docs/verification/incoming/dpi_lab.json contains a concrete authorized external artifact
validator.claim_boundary: The validator accepts or rejects artifact shape only; it does not import evidence or promote proof-gate claims by itself.

collector.example_command_shape: python3 scripts/ops/collect_external_dpi_proxy_reachability_evidence.py --allow-external-probes --target-url '<authorized target URL>' --treatment-proxy '<authorized proxy URL>' --operator-or-lab-id '<local secret>' --authorization-scope-id '<local ticket/scope>' --scope-summary '<bounded scope>' --network-region-bucket '<coarse region>' --network-type '<authorized lab/field network>' --isp-or-lab-profile '<local secret>' --egress-location-bucket '<coarse egress>' --policy-context '<authorized context>'
collector.claim_boundary: The collector writes only hashes, buckets, and redacted probe summaries. It keeps the artifact INCOMPLETE unless the explicitly authorized control path is blocked or detected and the treatment path is reachable.

import_gate.current_expected_decision: REJECTED for the current gap record
import_gate.claim_boundary: The import gate requires both the existing Ghost Pulse proof contract and this bounded DPI/proxy validator before a dpi_lab candidate can be READY_TO_IMPORT.

claim_boundary.summary: The shape itself is not evidence. A filled artifact can only describe bounded observations from an authorized external lab or field run.
claim_boundary.upgrade_rule: dpi_bypass_confirmed may be true only in a concrete artifact that records authorized external scope, a blocked or detected control path, a reachable treatment path, bounded packet-flow summaries, redacted raw captures or capture hashes, and explicit repeatability limits.

rules: artifact_id must not include customer, wallet, subscriber, or raw target identifiers
collector_kind must identify lab, field, or controlled relay collection without naming private persons
artifact_sha256 must equal SHA-256 of the canonical final redacted artifact with artifact_identity.artifact_sha256 set to 64 zeroes
authorization_present must be true before any external_dpi_tested claim can be true
scope_id_hash must be a digest or ticket hash, not a raw contract, name, email, or account id
collection_boundaries must state what networks, time windows, targets, and payload classes were excluded
network_region_bucket must be coarse enough to avoid identifying a subscriber
isp_or_lab_profile_hash must not expose raw ISP account, ASN notes, site address, or operator identity
time_window_utc must be bounded and must not imply durability beyond the observed window
control and treatment paths must be comparable except for the tested obfuscation or proxy behavior
probe_payload_class must describe payload category, not raw payload bytes
success and failure criteria must be defined before reporting results
probe_target_hash must be a digest; raw domains, URLs, IP addresses, SNI values, and Host headers are forbidden
failure_buckets must use categories such as dns_failed, tcp_failed, tls_failed, http_blocked, timeout, reset, or throttled
attempt_count and success_count must be counts, not percentages without sample sizes
captures must be summarized by buckets and hashes before being linked
packet_payloads_redacted must be true before a capture can be cited by this contract
packet_flow_summary does not by itself prove anonymity, durable bypass, or production readiness
redaction_performed and forbidden_raw_fields_absent must be true before any capture hash is accepted
raw_capture_retention_policy must say whether raw captures were destroyed, quarantined, or retained out of repository
redacted_capture_sha256 must refer to the redacted artifact only
not_generalizable_beyond_environment must be true unless a separate production-readiness artifact proves otherwise
refresh_after_utc must bound how long the observation should be treated as current
known_confounders must include middlebox variance, CDN routing changes, and target-side failures when applicable
dpi_bypass_confirmed must remain false unless external_dpi_tested, baseline_blocked_or_detected, and treatment_reachability_observed are all true
production_ready must remain false in this artifact family
decision must be one of incomplete, rejected, bounded_external_reachability_observed, or bounded_external_dpi_bypass_observed
not_proven must include production readiness, durable censorship bypass, anonymity, provider health, and customer traffic
proof_claims must repeat the result booleans instead of implying them from prose
source_artifacts must be repo-relative under docs/verification/incoming/artifacts when stored in this repository
source_hashes must include sha256 for each cited file and the validator must match it to on-disk file bytes
related_local_evidence_refs may cite local EventBus evidence, but local refs cannot replace external evidence

authorization_scope.scope_summary: example only, no authorized external collection
collection_boundaries: no real network collection represented by this example

raw_capture_redaction.raw_capture_retention_policy: no raw capture exists in this example

claim_boundary.upgrade_rule: Only a concrete authorized external artifact can raise these flags.
